article.title: Intel and SambaNova team up on heterogenous AI inference platform — different hardware performs different workloads
article.summary: Intel and SambaNova announce heterogeneous inference platform that can take advantage of Intel Xeon 6 CPUs, SambaNova SN50 RDUs, and Nvidia GPUs.
article.title_zh: Intel 與 SambaNova 合作異構 AI 推理平台 — 不同硬體執行不同工作負載
article.summary_zh: Intel 與 SambaNova 宣佈異構推理平台，可利用 Intel Xeon 6 CPU、SambaNova SN50 RDU 及 Nvidia GPU。

article.title: China intensifies efforts to poach semiconductor talent from Taiwan, claims report — international restrictions motivate illicit efforts to obtain talent and equipment
article.summary: Taiwan's National Security Bureau claims that China is intensifying efforts to steal semiconductor process technologies and other chip-related know-how from Taiwan as international restrictions get more severe.
article.title_zh: 中國加強從台灣挖角半導體人才力度，報告聲稱 — 國際限制促使非法爭取人才及設備的努力
article.summary_zh: 台灣國家安全局聲稱，隨著國際限制日趨嚴格，中國加強從台灣竊取半導體製程技術及其他晶片相關知識產權的力度。

article.title: iPhone Air 2 and iPhone 18e Reportedly Launching Early Next Year
article.summary: Apple plans to release an updated iPhone Air and a lower-end iPhone 18e early next year, according to the latest word from Bloomberg 's Mark Gurman . In a report this week, he said Apple plans to unveil the two devices in spring 2027, alongside a standard iPhone 18. If so, Apple will likely announce the trio of devices in March or April next year. It is unclear if there will be a live-streamed event. Given the iPhone 16e and the iPhone 17e were unveiled in the first quarter of 2025 and 2026, respectively, it is no surprise that an iPhone 18e will follow around the first quarter of next year. However, it is notable that a new iPhone Air and the standard iPhone 18 will apparently be introduced at the same time. The current iPhone Air and the standard iPhone 17 debuted in September last year,
article.title_zh: iPhone Air 2 和 iPhone 18e 據報於明年初推出
article.summary_zh: Apple 據報計畫於 2027 年春季推出更新款 iPhone Air 和入門級 iPhone 18e，同時推出標準 iPhone 18。

article.title: Apple's New M5 MacBook Air Hits $949 Record Low Price on Amazon
article.summary: Amazon has introduced a few new record low prices on the M5 MacBook Air this week, with up to $150 off these notebooks. We started tracking these deals over the weekend, and the selection of color options at best-ever prices has only expanded since then. Note: MacRumors is an affiliate partner with Amazon. When you click a link and make a purchase, we may receive a small payment, which helps us keep the site running. Amazon has the 512GB 13-inch M5 MacBook Air for $949.00 , down from $1,099.00, and the 24GB/1TB model for $1,349.00 , down from $1,499.00. Both of these represent new record low prices for each configuration. $150 OFF 13-inch M5 MacBook Air (512GB) for $949.00 $150 OFF 13-inch M5 MacBook Air (16GB/1TB) for $1,149.00 $150 OFF 13-inch M5 M
article.title_zh: Apple 新款 M5 MacBook Air 在 Amazon 創 $949 歷史新低
article.summary_zh: Amazon 本週推出 M5 MacBook Air 數個歷史新低價，優惠最高 $150，顏色選項與最優價格持續擴展。

article.title: Atlassian launches visual AI tools and third-party agents in Confluence
article.summary: Confluence users can now create visual assets within the software in addition to new third-party agents working with Lovable, Replit, and Gamma.
article.title_zh: Atlassian 在 Confluence 推出視覺 AI 工具和第三方 agents
article.summary_zh: Confluence 用戶現可在軟體內建立視覺資產，以及使用與 Lovable、Replit 和 Gamma 合作的新第三方 agents。

article.title: AI viewed as 'great equalizer' for small, midsized broadband operators
article.summary: AI is leveling the playing field and changing how smaller operators compete against larger rivals, says Cable One COO Ken Johnson. Operators of all sizes are evaluating the technology but moving at their own pace.
article.title_zh: AI 被視為小型及中型寬頻營運商的「偉大均衡器」
article.summary_zh: Cable One 首席運營官 Ken Johnson 表示，AI 正在平衡競爭環境，改變小型營運商與大型競爭對手的競爭方式。各規模的營運商都在評估該技術，但推進速度各不相同。

article.title: Go maintainer joins collective klaxon about encryption-breaking quantum computers — developer urges immediate switch to post-quantum methods to prevent worldwide disaster
article.summary: Go maintainer joins collective klaxon about encryption-breaking quantum computers and urges immediate switch to post-quantum methods to prevent disaster.
article.title_zh: Go 維護者加入量子電腦破解加密的警告行列——開發者敦促立即切換至後量子方法以防止全球災難
article.summary_zh: Go 維護者加入關於量子電腦破解加密的警告行列，並敦促立即切換至後量子密碼學方法以防止災難。

article.title: ChatGPT just added its first streaming video app, here’s what it can do
article.summary: ChatGPT’s apps feature continues its search for a purpose. Along the way, it found a streaming partner in search of an audience. Now what? more…
article.title_zh: ChatGPT 推出首款串流視頻應用，以下是其功能
article.summary_zh: ChatGPT 應用功能推出了首款串流視頻應用，與串流合作夥伴合作提供內容。

article.title: Momo拚電商營收成長：強化會員、品牌直營與開店平臺，要以AI打造電商競爭新優勢
article.summary: 面對通膨與關稅等外部環境的不確定性，加上電商高度競爭，Momo去年面臨上市以來營收首次衰退，Momo總經理谷元宏在今天(4/8)公開活動中表示，仍對電商市場成長抱持樂觀的態度，他表示，臺灣電商市場長期仍具成長空間，目前滲透率約14%至15%，相較周邊國家仍偏低，隨著科技演進與消費行為轉變，未來仍可望持續擴大。在整體市場「餅做大」的趨勢下，Momo今年的核心策略，是在成長動能中搶下更大市占，並以GMV（成交總額）成長為關鍵目標。
article.title_zh: Momo拚電商營收成長：強化會員、品牌直營與開店平臺，要以AI打造電商競爭新優勢
article.summary_zh: 面對通膨與關稅等外部環境的不確定性，加上電商高度競爭，Momo去年面臨上市以來營收首次衰退，Momo總經理谷元宏在今天(4/8)公開活動中表示，仍對電商市場成長抱持樂觀的態度，他表示，臺灣電商市場長期仍具成長空間，目前滲透率約14%至15%，相較周邊國家仍偏低，隨著科技演進與消費行為轉變，未來仍可望持續擴大。在整體市場「餅做大」的趨勢下，Momo今年的核心策略，是在成長動能中搶下更大市占，並以GMV（成交總額）成長為關鍵目標。

article.title: CoreWeave Tapping Junk Debt Market After Meta AI Computing Deal
article.summary: CoreWeave Inc. is tapping the junk bond market after expanding a deal to supply artificial intelligence computing power to Meta Platforms Inc.
article.title_zh: CoreWeave 在 Meta AI 運算交易後進軍垃圾債務市場
article.summary_zh: CoreWeave Inc. 在擴展向 Meta Platforms Inc. 供應人工智能運算能力的交易後，正進軍垃圾債券市場。

article.title: WhatsApp starts rolling out usernames in beta, keeps your phone number private
article.summary: WhatsApp has started rolling out, to a limited number of users, the ability to use a username in the app, finally ditching the long-standing requirement to use your phone number. more…
article.title_zh: WhatsApp 開始推出測試版使用者名稱，保護電話號碼隱私
article.summary_zh: WhatsApp 開始向有限使用者推出測試版使用者名稱功能，最終擺脫了長期以來使用電話號碼的要求。

article.title: That’s not cool: These top gaming phones with liquid cooling just got caught for benchmark cheating
article.summary: Credit: Nick Fernandez / Android Authority TL;DR The REDMAGIC 11 Pro phones have been delisted from various 3DMark benchmark rankings. The phones apparently engaged in benchmark cheating or manipulation. A YouTube video suggests that the phone reaches a ridiculous 55 degrees Celsius in stress tests. Update: April 8, 2026 (8:56 AM ET): Nubia has responded following the publication of this article. The company asserted that it views benchmarking as an indicator of potential performance under “controlled, high-load conditions.” Check out our article to read the full response . Original article: April 8, 2026 (3:11 AM ET): REDMAGIC is one of the few gaming phone manufacturers still on the market, offering devices with capacitive shoulder triggers, active cooling, and a host of other additions.
article.title_zh: 搭載液冷技術的頂級遊戲手機被爆跑分作弊
article.summary_zh: REDMAGIC 11 Pro 手機因跑分作弊被從多個 3DMark 基準測試排名中下架，YouTube 影片顯示該手機在壓力測試中溫度高達 55 度攝氏度。

article.title: AT&T maps its AI-grid edge game with Nvidia, Cisco, Microsoft
article.summary: AT&T has clarified its emerging AI “grid” and IoT strategy, combining regional inference, cloud platforms, and private 5G to target enterprise use cases while testing where edge AI delivers most value. In sum – what to know: Regional edge –…
article.title_zh: AT&T 與 Nvidia、Cisco、Microsoft 佈局 AI 邊緣網格戰略
article.summary_zh: AT&T 明確了其新興 AI「網格」和 IoT 策略，結合區域推理、雲平台和專網 5G 來鎖定企業用例，並測試邊緣 AI 的最大價值點。

article.title: Edge AI Is Forcing a Rethink of Predictive Maintenance Architecture
article.summary: Edge AI is rapidly moving predictive maintenance closer to the machine, but the industry has yet to agree on where the intelligence should ultimately reside. Automation vendors rooted in the factory floor
article.title_zh: 邊緣 AI 迫使預測性維護架構重新思考
article.summary_zh: 邊緣 AI 正快速推動預測性維護更靠近機器，但業界尚未就智慧功能應最終駐留何處達成共識。

article.title: So long, Llama: Meta unveils Muse Spark AI with Contemplating mode
article.summary: Llama is out; Muse Spark is in. Meta has unveiled its rebooted AI efforts with a new model it calls Muse Spark. Unlike Anthropic’s Claude Mythos Preview announcement yesterday , Muse Spark is actually available publicly today. Meta is also taking on the top Gemini and ChatGPT models with a new Contemplating mode that it says will roll out gradually. more…
article.title_zh: 告別 Llama：Meta 推出具有思考模式的 Muse Spark AI
article.summary_zh: Meta 推出了重新整改的 AI 產品 Muse Spark，與 Gemini 和 ChatGPT 等頂級模型競爭，現已公開推出。

article.title: Astropad Workbench Lets You Remotely Control Your Mac and AI Agents From iPhone and iPad
article.summary: Astropad, the company behind the popular Astropad Studio software for turning the iPad into a drawing tablet, today launched a new app called Astropad Workbench . Astropad Workbench is a remote desktop app designed for the Mac, and more specifically, built for use with AI. With Astropad Workbench, you can control your AI agents remotely, which makes it useful for people who have set up a Mac mini as a personal server for use with OpenClaw and other AI agent features. Astropad says that it created Workbench to help users monitor their AI agents from anywhere, without being tied to a desk. There are native apps for Mac, ‌iPad‌, and iPhone, so the iPhone and ‌iPad‌ are able to interface with the Mac desktop wherever you are. It's simple to check logs and output to verify a
article.title_zh: Astropad Workbench 讓你從 iPhone 和 iPad 遠端控制 Mac 及 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: Astropad 今日推出新應用 Astropad Workbench，一款為 Mac 設計的遠端桌面應用，專為 AI 使用而構建。

article.title: With Claude Managed Agents, Anthropic wants to run your AI agents for you
article.summary: Anthropic on Wednesday launched the public beta of Claude Managed Agents , a new service that allows businesses to quickly build and deploy cloud-based agents on its platform. Until now, Anthropic has mostly focused on providing its users with models to build their agents, but outside of Claude Code and Cowork, it hasn’t made its own infrastructure available for running those agents. With Claude Managed Agents, as the name implies, users can define the agents they want to run — either by describing the agent in natural language or through a YAML file — define their guardrails, and run them on Anthropic’s platform, with all of the infrastructure abstracted away. As the Anthropic team notes in today’s announcement, “shipping a production agent requires san
article.title_zh: 透過Claude Managed Agents，Anthropic希望為您運營AI Agent
article.summary_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Managed Agents公測版，讓企業能快速建立和部署雲端AI Agent，標誌著Anthropic從提供模型轉向提供完整服務的重要轉變。
